title: Lead Investment Banker at India Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at India Ratings
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
